_readme: 타임스탬프 whisper 단어 실측 (파이프라인 v6 기본)
title: good enough for me

sentences.en: I'm not worried. You shouldn't be worried.
sentences.ko: 난 걱정 안 해. 너희도 걱정할 거 없어.

sentences.en: Of course Woody ain't worried. He's been Andy's favourite since kindergarten.
sentences.ko: 당연히 우디야 걱정 없지. 유치원 때부터 앤디 최애였는데.

sentences.en: Hey, hey. Come on, Potato Head.
★ If Woody says it's all right, then, well, darn it, it's good enough for me.
sentences.ko: ★ 우디가 괜찮다고 하면, 뭐, 젠장, 난 그걸로 충분해.

sentences.en: ★ Woody has never steered us wrong before.
sentences.ko: ★ 우디가 우릴 잘못 이끈 적은 한 번도 없었지.
